creator: bartosz.duszel@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 227482
Remove TrueOS from the project's list (it's discontinued)

In the "Who Uses FreeBSD?" section in the Introduction chapter there is a TrueOS project mentioned. However this project is discontinued. I assume it might be a good idea to remove it from there and stick with the ongoing projects only. Especially since this project is mentioned in the wiki page with the list of products based on FreeBSD.
